posts.author: cryptocharlie404 (charlie)
posts.cookedHtml:
The monday client SDK is broken on mobile

monday.execute(‘confirm’) doesn’t fire, and doesn’t handle the promise

steps to reproduce:

  1. create a monday app
  2. use the sdk to call monday.execute(‘confirm’)

observe that the promise is not returned and your app is broken

is there a doc or post where we can track ongoing issues with the sdk on mobile?

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @cryptocharlie404! Apologies for the delay in getting back to you. It seems your question was posted in the wrong section, so I moved it to our “FAQs- Building monday Apps” section.

Are you still having trouble with this? To confirm, at this time our monday apps framework on mobile does not support many of the capabilities as our monday apps framework on web.

Here is a useful thread to check out where I list the SDK methods that are currently supported on mobile: Support for board views on mobile - #4 by BraveCarto.

I hope this helps!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
